## Collections.ConvertingResultMap class

A result map that wraps an inner [IResultMap](./ts-utils.collections.iresultmap.md) of source type and returns lazily-converted, cached values of a target type. Exposes the inner map via a [source](./ts-utils.collections.cacheinvalidatingresultmapwrapper.md) property that invalidates cache entries when mutations occur.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class ConvertingResultMap<TK extends string, TSRC, TTARGET, TSRCMAP extends IResultMap<TK, TSRC> = IResultMap<TK, TSRC>> extends ReadOnlyConvertingResultMap<TK, TSRC, TTARGET> 
```
**Extends:** [ReadOnlyConvertingResultMap](./ts-utils.collections.readonlyconvertingresultmap.md)<!-- -->&lt;TK, TSRC, TTARGET&gt;
